notes:
URGENT — Synthesis hackathon (synthesis.md). Building ends March 22. Invoica is a natural fit for 'Agents that pay' track. Repo is already public. CMO evaluates → CEO decides → CEO registers + plans submission autonomously.

FIX-011 runs first to unblock the synthesis tasks (and all week-101 tasks that write to reports/).

tasks.description: Fix orchestrate-agents-v2.ts pre-flight checks to allow report creation tasks and support reports/ paths
tasks.context:
SYMPTOM: Tasks with type 'bizdev', 'maintenance', or 'refactor' that CREATE NEW report files in reports/ are being skipped with 'deliverable files do not exist in repo'. Examples: SYNTHESIS-CMO-EVAL-001, FIX-010, CMO-001 all fail this check.

ROOT CAUSE 1 — Line ~1527 in scripts/orchestrate-agents-v2.ts:
  Current: `if (task.type !== 'feature' && (task as any).type !== 'docs') {`
  This means: if type is 'bizdev' or 'maintenance', ALL deliverable files must exist pre-flight.
  But for new report files (reports/*.md), the file doesn't exist yet — that's the whole point.

ROOT CAUSE 2 — VALID_PATH_PREFIXES array (around line ~1540):
  'reports/' is NOT in the array: ['backend/', 'frontend/', 'agents/', 'scripts/', ...]
  This means any file under reports/ fails path validation.

FIX (two changes in scripts/orchestrate-agents-v2.ts):

  CHANGE 1 — Add 'reports/' to VALID_PATH_PREFIXES:
  Find the VALID_PATH_PREFIXES array (const VALID_PATH_PREFIXES = [...]).
  Add 'reports/' to the array, e.g. after 'infrastructure/':
    OLD: ..., 'infrastructure/',
    NEW: ..., 'infrastructure/', 'reports/',

  CHANGE 2 — Skip existence check for report/doc output files:
  Find line: `const missing = deliverables.filter(f => !existsSync(f));`
  Replace with: `const missing = deliverables.filter(f => !existsSync(f) && !f.startsWith('reports/') && !f.startsWith('docs/'));`
  This allows tasks of ANY type to create new files under reports/ or docs/ without failing pre-flight.

NOTE: Do NOT change the check logic for code/tests files — those should still require existence for bugfix/refactor/maintenance tasks.

AFTER MAKING CHANGES:
  Run: cd /home/invoica/apps/Invoica && /home/invoica/apps/Invoica/node_modules/.bin/tsc --project scripts/tsconfig.json --noEmit --skipLibCheck 2>&1 | grep error | head -5
  If tsconfig doesn't exist for scripts, run: node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck 2>&1 | grep error | head -5
  Expect 0 new errors from this change.

  Then: git add scripts/orchestrate-agents-v2.ts && git commit -m 'fix: orchestrate-agents-v2 pre-flight — allow reports/ paths and new report file creation' && git push

AFTER COMMIT: confirm changes pushed successfully.

tasks.description: Evaluate Synthesis hackathon opportunity and write a memo to the CEO recommending participation or not
tasks.context:
The Synthesis (synthesis.md) is an online builder event running March 4–25, 2026. Building ends March 22. It is described as 'the first builder event you can enter without a body' — AI agents can participate autonomously.

FOUR TRACKS:
  1. Agents that pay — transparent agent spending mechanisms ← PERFECT FIT for Invoica
  2. Agents that trust — decentralized identity and verification
  3. Agents that cooperate — trustless deal-making infrastructure
  4. Agents that keep secrets — privacy-preserving agent interactions

INVOICA FIT ANALYSIS (CMO to assess):
  - Invoica IS 'agents that pay': x402 invoice middleware, on-chain USDC settlement, autonomous billing
  - Repo is already public at github.com/skingem1/Invoica — open source requirement met
  - Existing live demo: backend API + dashboard at app.invoica.ai
  - On-chain artifacts: Base Mainnet settlement txns (score points with judges per skill.md)
  - Agent-native: built entirely by 18 AI agents with zero human code

COMPETITIVE CONTEXT:
  - This is a niche event (AI/agent builders, Ethereum-aligned) — natural early-adopter audience for Invoica
  - Winning or placing = credibility signal for the free beta period
  - Exposure to Ethereum/Base ecosystem developers who are exactly Invoica's ICP

DELIVERABLE: Write memo to CEO at reports/cmo/synthesis-eval-2026-03-19.md
  Structure:
  - Opportunity summary (2–3 sentences)
  - Track fit score (1–10) with reasoning
  - Submission angle: what to pitch (e.g. 'Invoica = payment infrastructure for the agent economy, live on Base')
  - Risks or concerns (e.g. deadline, open source, team size)
  - Recommendation: PARTICIPATE or SKIP with 1 sentence rationale
  Max 400 words. This memo goes straight to CEO for the go/no-go decision.

AFTER WRITING: confirm file written at reports/cmo/synthesis-eval-2026-03-19.md

tasks.description: Read CMO memo and write CEO decision + Synthesis submission plan document
tasks.context:
Read CMO evaluation memo at reports/cmo/synthesis-eval-2026-03-19.md before proceeding.

NOTE: API registration and Telegram steps require human action (Tarek). This task's job is to write the decision and submission plan documents so Tarek has everything he needs to act.

STEP 1 — Read the CMO memo at reports/cmo/synthesis-eval-2026-03-19.md

STEP 2 — Write CEO decision to reports/ceo/synthesis-decision-2026-03-19.md:
  - State whether to PARTICIPATE or SKIP based on the CMO memo
  - If CMO recommends PARTICIPATE (expected): write 1-paragraph rationale confirming the go decision
  - If CMO recommends SKIP: write 1-paragraph rationale

STEP 3 — Write submission plan to reports/ceo/synthesis-submission-plan-2026-03-19.md:
  Include:
  - Track: 'Agents that pay'
  - Submission summary: live Invoica platform (invoica.ai + api.invoica.ai + github.com/skingem1/Invoica)
  - Demo narrative: 'Invoica is payment infrastructure for the agent economy. Agents create invoices, receive x402 payment requests, settle in USDC on Base — fully autonomously. Built by 18 AI agents with zero human code.'
  - On-chain evidence section: note that txHash records for Base Mainnet USDC settlements are in the DB (Supabase settlements table — check settlement records)
  - Collaboration evidence: reference the git log (769 commits, 18 agents, 96.4% approval rate)
  - HUMAN ACTION REQUIRED section with clear steps for Tarek:
    1. Register at synthesis.md with: agent name='Invoica CEO Agent', description='CEO of Invoica — Financial OS for the Agent Economy. x402 middleware on Base.', harness='orchestrator', model='claude-sonnet-4-6'
    2. Need to provide: your name, email, X/Twitter handle, background (founder), crypto experience (expert), AI experience (expert), coding comfort (high), one-liner about Invoica
    3. Submit before March 22 deadline
